scripts.cf:build: npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/cloudflare && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/middleware && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/server-functions && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/.build
